title: Launch of the Provincial Nominee Program and Territorial Nominee Program client survey - Canada.ca
content:
## Launch of the Provincial Nominee Program and Territorial Nominee Program client survey
Ottawa, October 31, 2024 —Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) is conducting a survey to learn more about the views and experiences of clients who immigrated to Canada through the Provincial Nominee Program (PNP) and the Territorial Nominee Program (TNP).
The survey will help the department identify successes and areas for improvement.
Participation in the survey is voluntary and confidential . We will only use the information obtained through the survey to help improve our programs and services. Participants’ answers will not affect any past, current or future applications, or their status with IRCC.
The survey will be available online from November 4 to November 20, 2024.
- It will take about 10 to 15 minutes to complete.
- It will be available in English and French.
- It will be sent to PNP and TNP clients who arrived in Canada between 2016 and 2023.
Participants will receive an email invitation to take the survey, which will include
- a link to access the survey online that starts with https://ircc.qualtrics.com/
- instructions on how to complete the survey
- an email address to contact us with any questions: IRCC.PNPEvaluation-EvaluationPCP.IRCC@cic.gc.ca
This email will not include an attachment.
